questions.question: Which command is recommended to start the full project stack after copying environment variables?
Explain why the onboarding flow standardizes copying root .env.example to backend/.env before running Docker Compose.
questions.correct_answer: It ensures backend runtime variables are present in the expected env_file path so all services start consistently for new contributors.

questions.question: Which backend framework is used in this project?
What is the main purpose of Alembic in this stack?
Describe when you should run 'alembic upgrade head' in this project lifecycle.
questions.correct_answer: After bringing up services or before local backend run to ensure the database schema matches the latest migration state.

questions.question: Which ports are expected to be free for default project startup?
A frontend app running on a custom origin gets CORS errors. What backend-related setting should be updated?
Why should production avoid wildcard CORS origins?
questions.correct_answer: Wildcard origins weaken cross-origin security controls; explicit trusted origins reduce unauthorized browser-based access risk.

questions.question: What behavior occurs when AUTH_ENABLED=false?
options: Auth endpoints return 200 with mock tokens
Auth router is not mounted and /api/auth/* returns 404
JWT becomes optional but endpoints still work
questions.correct_answer: Auth router is not mounted and /api/auth/* returns 404

questions.question: Compare the practical impact of AUTH_ENABLED=true versus AUTH_ENABLED=false for API clients.
questions.correct_answer: With true, auth endpoints are available for login/register flows; with false, those routes are absent so clients must not depend on /api/auth/*.

questions.question: The backend container exits with 'set: pipefail: invalid option name'. What is the most likely root cause?
options: CRLF line endings in shell scripts
questions.correct_answer: CRLF line endings in shell scripts

questions.question: What command helps normalize line endings in a repo already cloned with incorrect CRLF conversions?
Docker image pulls fail with TLS handshake timeout. What mitigation is documented in this project?
questions.correct_answer: Use the configured public.ecr.aws mirror-based base image defaults and retry compose build/up to avoid unstable Docker Hub access.

questions.question: Which command checks backend test coverage against a minimum threshold?
Why can 'npm ci' fail even when package.json looks correct, and what is the first fix?
questions.correct_answer: It fails when package-lock.json is out of sync with dependencies; run npm install to regenerate lockfile consistency before npm ci.

questions.question: Which frontend stack is used by this project?
A teammate starts backend without containers. List the minimum local setup steps before running the server.
questions.correct_answer: Create and activate virtualenv, install requirements, copy .env, run alembic upgrade head, then start uvicorn on host 0.0.0.0:8000.

questions.question: In this architecture, what role does Redis primarily play?
You need to verify backend health quickly after startup. Which endpoint is documented for that?
Design a brief strategy to debug a worker that is not processing jobs, using documented commands.
questions.correct_answer: Inspect redis and worker logs with docker compose logs --tail=200, then rebuild/restart worker service via docker compose up --build -d worker and recheck processing.
